Uses of Class
com.irurueta.units.Angle

    • Uses of Angle in com.irurueta.units

      Methods in com.irurueta.units that return Angle 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static Angle Angle.addAndReturnNew(Angle arg1, Angle arg2, AngleUnit unit)
      Adds two angles.
      Angle Angle.addAndReturnNew(Angle a, AngleUnit unit)
      Adds provided angle to current instance and returns a new angle.
      Angle Angle.addAndReturnNew(double value, AngleUnit unit, AngleUnit resultUnit)
      Adds provided angle value and unit and returns a new angle instance using provided unit.
      Angle Angle.addAndReturnNew(Number value, AngleUnit unit, AngleUnit resultUnit)
      Adds provided angle value and unit and returns a new angle instance using provided unit.
      static Angle AngleConverter.convertAndReturnNew(Angle input, AngleUnit outputUnit)
      Converts an angle to requested output unit.
      static Angle AngleConverter.fromDegreesAndMinutesAndReturnNew(int degrees, double minutes, AngleUnit resultUnit)
      Gets new angle containing decimal degrees from provided integer degrees and decimal minutes.
      static Angle AngleConverter.fromDegreesMinutesAndSecondsAndReturnNew(int degrees, int minutes, double seconds, AngleUnit resultUnit)
      Gets new angle containing decimal degrees from provided integer degrees, integer minutes and decimal seconds.
      Angle AngleFormatter.parse(String source)
      Parses provided string and tries to determine an angle value and unit.
      Angle AngleFormatter.parseDegreesAndMinutes(CharSequence source)
      Parses provided string representation using degrees and decimal minutes format.
      Angle AngleFormatter.parseDegreesMinutesAndSeconds(CharSequence source)
      Parses provided string representation using degrees, minutes and decimal seconds format.
      static Angle Angle.subtractAndReturnNew(Angle arg1, Angle arg2, AngleUnit unit)
      Subtracts two angles.
      Angle Angle.subtractAndReturnNew(Angle a, AngleUnit unit)
      Subtracts provided angle to current instance and returns a new angle.
      Angle Angle.subtractAndReturnNew(double value, AngleUnit unit, AngleUnit resultUnit)
      Subtracts provided angle value and unit and returns a new angle instance using provided unit.
      Angle Angle.subtractAndReturnNew(Number value, AngleUnit unit, AngleUnit resultUnit)
      Subtracts provided angle value and unit and returns a new angle instance using provided unit.

      Converts an angle to requested output unit.

      Formats provided angle into degrees and decimal minutes.
      String AngleFormatter.formatDegreesMinutesAndSeconds(Angle angle)
      Formats provided angle into degrees, minutes and decimal seconds.

      Gets angle from provided integer degrees and decimal minutes and sets the value into provided angle instance.
      static void AngleConverter.fromDegreesMinutesAndSeconds(int degrees, int minutes, double seconds, Angle result)
      Gets decimal degrees from provided integer degrees, integer minutes and decimal seconds and sets the value into provided angle instance.

      Converts provided angle to integer degrees and decimal minutes.
